title: with_cert_verified_pubkey: RAII closure eviction is sound
description: with_cert_verified_pubkey correctly handles the four cases: f succeeds + evict succeeds (return Ok), f succeeds + evict fails (return evict error, losing f's Ok value — intentional, cache slot leaked would be worse), f fails + evict succeeds (return original error), f fails + evict fails (log warn, return original error). This is exactly the right semantics for a network-backed RAII handle. A contributor might suggest returning both errors on the double-failure path, but that requires a compound error type and the log::warn is sufficient.
